description: Call 5 get-item-detail versions for Taobao and Tmall Product Details through JustOneAPI with itemId.

operations.description: Get Taobao and Tmall product Details data, including pricing, images, and shop details, for product research, catalog monitoring, and ecommerce analysis.

parameters.description: Access token for this API service.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: AUnique product identifier on Taobao/Tmall (item ID).
parameters.name: itemId

operations.description: Get Taobao and Tmall product Details data through the task-backed v2 flow. If data is not ready within a short wait, the response returns a pending task status.

parameters.description: Access token for this API service.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: AUnique product identifier on Taobao/Tmall (item ID).
parameters.name: itemId
